issues.description: DSL is empty. Card has a conditional power boost effect that should be defined: 'If you have 2 or more rested {ODYSSEY} type Characters, this Character gains +1000 power.' This requires a Trigger (likely OnPlay or Permanent passive), a Condition checking rested ODYSSEY characters, and a PowerBoost action.

suggestedDsl.effectText: If you have 2 or more rested {ODYSSEY} type Characters, this Character gains +1000 power.
